records.ety: [Pg. coquilho, Sp. coquillo, dim. of coco a cocoanut.]

defs: The fruit of a Brazilian tree (Attalea funifera of Martius.).
notes: ☞ Its shell is hazel-brown in color, very hard and close in texture, and much used by turners in forming ornamental articles, such as knobs for umbrella handles.
